body_preview: # Tisch Summer High School Residential Program The Tisch Summer High School Residential Program is an intensive, four-week pre-college program open to high school sophomores and juniors from around the world. The rigorous program is based on the Tisch undergraduate curriculum and
description: Tisch Special Programs runs a four-week summer high school program each July. This program is open to high school sophomores and juniors. Areas of study include: dance, drama, production & design, dramatic writing, game design, photography and imaging, and recorded music.
title: Tisch Summer High School Residential Program
